name: Set of 3 Black Ceramic Taper Candle Holders - Threshold™
description:
Enhance the look and feel of your home with this Set of 3 Ceramic Taper Candle Holders from Threshold™. These black candle holders are designed like a spindle in varying heights. Made of ceramic, these holders are compatible with taper candles, making them perfect for holidays, at-home date nights and beyond.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
